flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cypress College rose 39% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.9k → $12.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cypress College rose 11% between 2007 and 2010 ($4.7k → $5.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cypress College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cypress College rose 50% between 2007 and 2010 (10.0k → 15.0k).
